sentences.text: Amy this is Elise I'm calling with rentable how are you today.
I'm good could you please take us off your waiting list. I mean your your calling list.

You have reached E N C realty management. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time or you may dial eight for our staff directory. Otherwise please listen closely to the following options using the keys on your telephone. Please spell the last name of the person then press pound for the letter, Q press seven for the letter. Hi. Amy, Bob, if this is correct press pound for the Pri will Armstrong if this is correct press pound for the previous name in the directory press one to here additional Amy this and if this is correct press pound for the previous Amy this and if this is correct press pound for the previous name in the directory press one to here additional information press two to hear the next directory name press three to spell a new name press four to spell the first name press five to exit that you're using the keys on your telephone. Please spell the last name of the person then press pound for the letter, Q press seven. For the letter Z press nine to exit. Amy, Bob, if this is correct press pound for the previous name in the directory press one to here additional information press two. Hi, this is Amy.
